title: coupon — kill switches
description: Operational kill switches distinct from the tier-based `features.json` gates. These are for emergency-off / staged rollout / per-tenant ops interventions. Every flag is ON in normal production; off flips are ops decisions.

flags.description: Master toggle for CouponRedeemer::redeem(). Off = every redemption call refuses with 503 COUPON_REDEMPTION_MAINTENANCE. The invoice/membership module handles the refusal by refusing the invoice line or creating it without the discount (configurable per calling module). Emergency-only (used during DB migrations of the coupons table).
Off = finance::RefundIssued / ChargebackFiled do NOT cascade to coupon clawback. Admins must reverse redemptions manually. Emergency-only if the cascade is misbehaving.
Off = CouponRedeemed does NOT fire marketing events downstream. Ad-network optimisation pauses. Used when marketing module is unstable.

Off = IssueCouponOnReferralRewardVested hook skips. referrals::ReferralRewardVested with discount reward type does NOT auto-create a coupon. Manual admin issue path still works. Emergency-only if the referrals bridge is misbehaving.
Off = ReconcileUsageCountJob + ExpireCouponsJob + NotifyExpiringCouponsJob skip. Only flip off for maintenance windows.

Off = coupon.rate_limit middleware becomes a no-op. Every preview + validate call proceeds without rate limiting. Emergency-only if the rate limiter is misbehaving OR during a legitimate high-traffic promotional event where the limits become false-positive.

Off = usage_cap is advisory-only; redemptions proceed past the cap. Emergency-only when a tenant is willing to overshoot a campaign cap and reconcile later. Every fire of a refusal with the flag off produces a warn-severity audit row.

Off = GenerateCouponUsageReportJob still runs BUT does NOT dispatch the WeeklyCouponReportNotification email. Report remains available via GET /coupons/report. Used when notification module is unstable.
